# Lando DS

> A self-describing, AI-native design system for React. 127 production-ready components, semantic OKLCH design tokens, and a structured `dist/meta.json` artifact your AI agent reads in milliseconds — so it grounds itself on the real API surface instead of guessing.

## What this library is

A React component library distributed as `@lando-labs/lando-ds`. Every release ships a structured JSON metadata artifact describing the entire library — component names, prop signatures, defaults, tokens, icons, RSC compatibility, polymorphic types, composition slots, theme presets, and prop-inheritance (`extends`) chains — for AI coding agents to ground themselves in. Brand-neutral by default; the original Lando palette is opt-in via `<ThemeProvider preset="lando">`.

## Primary artifacts

- [README](https://github.com/lando-labs/lando-ds/blob/main/README.md): overview, AI-consumability story, install + quick start
- [`dist/meta.json`](https://github.com/lando-labs/lando-ds/blob/main/dist/meta.json): light metadata (component registry, **hooks**, tokens, icons, capabilities, theme presets) — ~115 KB, `$schemaVersion: 1.3`
- [`dist/meta.verbose.json`](https://github.com/lando-labs/lando-ds/blob/main/dist/meta.verbose.json): verbose metadata (adds descriptions, composition slots, examples) — ~296 KB
- [`src/meta/schema.json`](https://github.com/lando-labs/lando-ds/blob/main/src/meta/schema.json): JSON Schema (draft-07) for both meta artifacts (`$schemaVersion: 1.3`)

## Components (127, grouped)

- **Layout primitives (11):** Divider, Container, Grid, GridItem, Stack, Inline, Box, AspectRatio, Center, Spacer, ScrollArea
- **Typography (5):** Heading, Text, Kbd, Code, Mark
- **Core & form (23):** Button, Input, NumberInput, FileInput, Select, Combobox, MultiSelect, Checkbox, Radio, RadioGroup, Switch, Slider, Textarea, TagInput, Form, Field, IconButton, SegmentedControl, ColorSwatch, DateDisplay, Calendar, DatePicker, DateRangePicker
- **Data display (26):** Card, CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter, CardTitle, CardMedia, Badge, Chip, Avatar, AvatarGroup, Table, DataTable, DataTableStatic, List, ListItem, StatCard, TaskCard, DetailCard, Timeline, TimelineItem, TimelineGroup, ApprovalCard, ArticleCard, Byline, Lede, PullQuote
- **Feedback & status (10):** AlertDialog, Progress, StepProgress, Alert, Callout, Banner, Skeleton, Spinner, StatusDot, EmptyState
- **Overlay & interactive (21):** Modal, Drawer, Toast, ToastContainer, ToastProvider, Tooltip, Tabs, TabList, Tab, TabPanel, Accordion, AccordionItem, Portal, Slot, Dropdown, DropdownItem, Popover, CommandPalette, CommandPaletteGroup, CommandPaletteItem, Collapsible
- **Navigation & chrome (14):** Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbItem, Pagination, StickyBar, Header, Sidebar, SidebarNavItem, Footer, BottomNav, BottomNavItem, PageHeader, AppShell, NavTabs, NavTabsItem
- **Content display (3):** CodeBlock, Markdown, VisuallyHidden
- **Communication (4):** Chat, ChatMessage, ChatInput, ChatThinkingIndicator
- **Theming (2):** ThemeBuilder, ThemeScope
- **Data visualization (8):** Chart, LineChart, BarChart, AreaChart, PieChart, DonutChart, FunnelChart, Sparkline

Also root-exported (not counted in the 127 component total): `ThemeProvider` + `useTheme` (theming runtime), the design `tokens`, and the Lucide-backed `Icon` set (curated + pass-throughs).

## Hooks

A headless hooks library, importable from the package root or `@lando-labs/lando-ds/hooks`, and queryable from `meta.hooks` (name, category, canonical signature, description). **Prefer these over hand-rolling** — before they were discoverable, a consumer importing the DS in 77 files still rewrote `useFocusTrap` from scratch.

- **state:** useDisclosure, useToggle, useDebouncedValue, useLocalStorage
- **timing:** useInterval, useTimeout
- **dom:** useEventListener, useClickOutside, useHover, useIntersection, useResizeObserver, useWindowScroll
- **browser:** useMediaQuery, useViewportSize, useClipboard
- **lifecycle:** useMounted
- **a11y:** useFocusTrap
- **keyboard:** useKeyPress
- **layout:** usePortalPosition

All are client-only (`'use client'`, `serverSafe: false`), SSR-safe (stable value on first render, real value after mount — no hydration mismatch), and depend on nothing but React. Full reference: [`reference/hooks.md`](https://github.com/lando-labs/lando-ds/blob/main/reference/hooks.md).

## How to use the meta

```js
import meta from '@lando-labs/lando-ds/meta'
// meta.components.Button.props    // -> prop signatures
// meta.hooks.useDisclosure        // -> { category, signature, returns, description }
// meta.tokens.colors.semantic     // -> semantic token registry
// meta.capabilities.rscSafe       // -> array of RSC-safe component names
// meta.themePresets               // -> available theme presets (e.g. 'lando')

import verbose from '@lando-labs/lando-ds/meta-verbose'
// verbose.components.Button.composes    // -> { leftIcon: { accepts: 'Icon' }, ... }
// verbose.components.Button.description  // -> markdown description

import { validate } from '@lando-labs/lando-ds/meta-schema'
// validate(meta) // -> asserts the meta is conformant against schema 1.3
```

## See also

- [GitHub](https://github.com/lando-labs/lando-ds): source, issues, contributions
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@lando-labs/lando-ds): package
